title: Verilog real ports are converted to uint64_t sc_signals when verilating to SystemC

features.name: real-valued input port declaration
features.description: Code should include an input port declaration with data type real (floating-point)

features.name: real-valued output port declaration
features.description: Code should include an output port declaration with data type real (floating-point)

features.name: real port assignment in always block
features.description: Code should include a module with real-valued input and output ports where the output is assigned in an always block sensitivity to the real input
features.snippet: module simple(input real i_VDD, output real o_VDD); always @(i_VDD) o_VDD <= i_VDD; endmodule
